import json, os, pandas as pd, numpy as np, re, unicodedata, difflib, math

quran_path='/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path='/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json'
with open(quran_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran=json.load(f)
len(quran), type(quran)

# Let's inspect keys of first item
quran[0].keys()

with open(hadith_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith=json.load(f)
type(hadith), len(hadith)

original_span="إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلِيَاءُ بَعْضٍ يَأْمُرُونَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَيَنْهَوْنَ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ"
snippet="إِنَّ الْم...لْمُنْكَرِ"
print(original_span)

# Normalization functions
AR_DIAC = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
PUNCT = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+', re.UNICODE)
SPACES = re.compile(r'\s+')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = AR_DIAC.sub('', s)
    s = TATWEEL.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = PUNCT.sub(' ', s)
    s = SPACES.sub(' ', s)
    return s.strip().lower()

normalized_original = normalize_ar(original_span)
normalized_original

def search_quran_by_substring(text):
    target_norm = normalize_ar(text)
    matches=[]
    for i, item in enumerate(quran):
        ayah = item['ayah_text']
        norm = normalize_ar(ayah)
        if all(tok in norm for tok in target_norm.split()):
            # we can compute similarity
            # We'll compute ratio of LCS over max length maybe.
            seq = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=norm, b=target_norm)
            ratio = seq.ratio()
            matches.append((ratio, i, item))
        else:
            # also check if target_norm is substring ignoring spaces? we did tokens check
            if target_norm in norm:
                seq = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=norm, b=target_norm)
                ratio = seq.ratio()
                matches.append((ratio, i, item))
    # sort by ratio descending
    matches.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return matches[:10]

q_matches = search_quran_by_substring(original_span)
[(m[0], m[2]['surah_id'], m[2]['ayah_id'], m[2]['ayah_text'][:50]) for m in q_matches[:5]]

def best_quran_matches_by_ratio(text, topn=10):
    target_norm = normalize_ar(text)
    matches=[]
    for i,item in enumerate(quran):
        norm = normalize_ar(item['ayah_text'])
        ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=norm, b=target_norm).ratio()
        # We'll also try LCS or token F1
        matches.append((ratio, i, item))
    matches.sort(key=lambda x:x[0], reverse=True)
    return matches[:topn]

bests = best_quran_matches_by_ratio(original_span, 10)
[(r, it['surah_id'], it['ayah_id'], it['ayah_text'][:80]) for r, _, it in [(x[0], x[1], x[2]) for x in bests]]

def longest_common_substring_length(a,b):
    # dynamic programming O(n*m)
    n=len(a); m=len(b)
    dp=[0]*(m+1)
    best=0
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev=0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            temp=dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j]=prev+1
                if dp[j]>best:
                    best=dp[j]
            else:
                dp[j]=0
            prev=temp
    return best

cand = [x[2]['ayah_text'] for x in bests]
cand_norm=normalize_ar(cand[0])
norm_original = normalize_ar(original_span)
lcs_len=longest_common_substring_length(cand_norm, norm_original)
len(norm_original), lcs_len, cand_norm[:120], norm_original

def best_hadith_matches_by_ratio(text, topn=10):
    target_norm = normalize_ar(text)
    matches=[]
    for i,item in enumerate(hadith):
        matn = item.get('Matn') or item.get('hadithTxt') or ''
        norm = normalize_ar(matn)
        if not norm:
            continue
        # SequenceMatcher ratio isn't robust; compute LCS recall and token recall maybe
        L = longest_common_substring_length(norm, target_norm)
        ratio = L/len(target_norm) if target_norm else 0
        matches.append((ratio, i, item))
    matches.sort(key=lambda x:x[0], reverse=True)
    return matches[:topn]

h_matches = best_hadith_matches_by_ratio(original_span, 5)
[(x[0], x[2].get('Matn')[:80] if x[2].get('Matn') else x[2].get('hadithTxt')[:80]) for x in h_matches]
